name: proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_ie_features
raw_query: any where (process.command_line:"* -name IEHarden *" and process.command_line:"* -value 0 *") or (process.command_line:"* -name DEPOff *" and process.command_line:"* -value 1 *") or (process.command_line:"* -name DisableFirstRunCustomize *" and process.command_line:"* -value 2 *")
